payload.answer: SQL debug/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No query was run and no memory was read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: Administrative SQL execution was requested, but debug SQL access is disabled.

details: No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use supported non-SQL Brain admin or inspection commands if available.
